markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review 2023 performance and align on the 2024 partnership renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Partnership Renewed:** The 12-month, $18k/mo contract auto-renews Jan 20, 2025. The scope expands to include customer retention and AI agent topics.](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
  - [**Critical Data Discrepancy:** GA4 data is unreliable, showing \~2.5k organic sessions vs. GSC's \~6k clicks for Dec 1–16. This issue, likely from a July OneTrust change, requires an immediate fix.](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [**Repositioning Success:** Content is effectively shifting the brand narrative from "sales execution" to "revenue workflow," with strong AI visibility (44% of responses) and a clear competitive buffer against Gong.](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
  - [**Team Change:** Cade McNelly departs Jan 7. This will slow content reviews, and the team will decide whether to maintain weekly syncs.](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=1923.0)

## Topics

### Data Discrepancy & CMS Glitch

  - [**GA4 vs. GSC Discrepancy**](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
      - [**Problem:** GA4 data is unreliable, showing a massive gap vs. GSC.](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
      - [**Example (Dec 1–16):**](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
          - [**GA4:** \~2.5k organic sessions](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
          - [**GSC:** \~6k organic clicks](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
      - [**Cause:** Likely a persistent issue from a July OneTrust cookie consent change that caused a 70% traffic decline.](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
      - [**Solution:** Jo will escalate to Paul (analytics) and Andrew (web dev). A full GA4 tracking snippet reset is recommended.](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)
  - [**CMS Glitch**](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
      - [**Problem:** The CMS reloads endlessly when adding inline CTAs.](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
      - [**Context:** A known, recurring issue.](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
      - [**Solution:** Jo will send a Loom video to Hadassah to tag Andrew for a fix.](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)

### Partnership Renewal & 2024 Strategy

  - [**Renewal Confirmed**](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
      - [**Status:** The partnership will auto-renew on Jan 20, 2025.](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)
      - [**Terms:** 12-month contract at $18,000/month, with the same operational setup.](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=1863.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Outreach is highly satisfied with the quantity and quality of content, which is driving pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
  - [**2024 Strategic Focus**](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=1583.0)
      - [**Core Goal:** Continue repositioning Outreach as a "revenue workflow platform."](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=1583.0)
      - [**New Topic Clusters:**](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
          - [Customer Retention / Churn Reduction](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
          - [AI Agents & "Ask Outreach" features](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
      - [**Content Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
          - [**Artifacts:** Upload customer case studies and a proprietary AI usage report (due Feb) to the knowledge base for content sourcing.](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
          - [**Experiments:** Test single-factor changes (e.g., prompt variations) to improve AI citation ranking.](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)

### 2023 Performance Review

  - [**Content Production:** 82 articles (net new + refreshes) published since mid-year.](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
  - [**Organic Traffic (July–Nov):**](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
      - [\~5,800 sessions from GrowthX-produced content.](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
      - [66% engagement rate (sessions \>10s, \>2 pages, key event), which is above the 50–60% B2B benchmark.](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
  - [**AI Visibility:**](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
      - [44% of AI-related responses cite Outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
      - [93% of citations are from third-party publications, underscoring the need for consistent brand messaging across all external sites.](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
  - [**Competitive Landscape:** A strong buffer exists against Gong, whose citation presence is growing but remains smaller.](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=1437.0)

      - [Export Gong citation data for analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
      - [Share the 2024 AI experimentation framework in January.](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)
  - [**Hadassah:**](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=1923.0)
      - [Tag Andrew on Slack with the CMS video.](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
      - [Share FY27 marketing goals and the "revenue orchestration" announcement to inform content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)
      - [Decide whether to maintain weekly syncs post-Jan 7.](https://fathom.video/share/PzxNFYQjCVG37jbyMxKxzLr1YZx3wJis?tab=summary&timestamp=1923.0)
